name: Apple Maple Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture slowly to a boil over medium heat.
3. Cook until it reaches the jelling point, stirring frequently to prevent sticking.
4. Once thickened, remove from heat and pour into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
5. Adjust lids and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
6. Yield: about 8 half-pint jars.
